currentObjective: Organize the repo with a branch-agnostic multi-agent control plane using LangGraph concepts, shared task/status/handoff/message files, and clear Codex/Claude conversation lanes. Keep Confluence as the requirements source and never commit secrets.
mergePolicy: No merge without explicit user approval.

workstreams.goal: Scaffold the shared `.agents` contract, scripts, and docs so both agents can poll and talk through the repo.
chunks: Create task, ownership, status, handoff, and message templates
Add helper scripts for status, polling, and messages
Wire package scripts and README guidance
Publish the Claude prompt and branch split

workstreams.goal: Add a LangGraph orchestration plan and map product/test/security/housekeeping roles onto the repo-native contract.

coordinationRules: Read the shared task, ownership, status, handoff, and message files before starting new work.
Poll the other agent every 5 seconds while actively working.
Update your own status every 30-60 seconds and on every blocker change.
Keep write scopes disjoint unless the task explicitly says otherwise.
Product owns requirements quality, use cases, and non-functional expectations before implementation starts.
